features: DERMA 72H ACTIVE PROTECTION: This anti-perspirant roll-on prevents sweat and odour from forming for up to 72 hours of continuous protection, keeping you feeling fresher for longer
COOL CARE FORMULA: The sweat block roll-on uses our innovative Cool-Care formula to deliver a boost of cool freshness to the skin, keeping the underarms feeling clean and invigorated
STAY FRESH: The men's deodorant is designed to keep you feeling confident all day long, preventing sweat patches or unpleasant body odour from forming during busy days and activities
HOW TO USE: Apply a thin layer of the NIVEA men's deodorant to the underarms and allow to dry before putting on clothes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: This men's deodorant has been dermatologically proven to be gentle on skin, providing active protection without using ethyl alcohol which can dry out the skin
description: Product Description NIVEA Men Cool Kick Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Roll On (6 x 50ml) - Keep your cool for up to 72 hours NIVEA MEN Cool Kick Anti-Perspirant Deodorant gives you an instant feeling of freshness while effectively protecting you from sweat and body odour for 72 hours. The formula with Cool-Care will leave you feeling fresh while protecting and caring for your skin no matter what your day has in store, providing dry freshness to keep you feeling clean for the rest of the day. The formula is dermatologically proven to be kind to skin. Present in over 160 countries, NIVEA is one of the world's largest and most trusted skincare brands with more than 140 years of experience. As a market leader in the global skincare industry, our researchers work extensively to provide high-quality, dermatologically approved products to suit various skin types and needs for a clean, confident, and carefree experience.​ How to use: Apply a thin layer of the men's roll on deodorant onto the underarms and allow to dry before putting on clothes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin Product Benefits: Men's antiperspirant roll-on Prevents sweating and body odour Derma 72h Active Protection Dermatologically tested 6 x 50ml Ingredients Aqua, Alcohol Denat, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, PEG-8, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Parfum, Octyldodecanol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Citric Acid, Geraniol. Directions Roll deodorant evenly on underarm skin for 48 hours. Allow the product to dry completely before dressing. CONTAINS 0% Ethyl Alcohol, 48H PROTECTION: Fresh Active provides up to 48 hours of anti-perspirant and deodorizing protection, protecting you from bad odors all day. Box Contains 6 x Cool Kick 48h Anti-Perspirant 50ml Roll On See more
